---
title: "A Beautiful Graphic "
author: " fasehab "
execute:
  echo: false
format : html
---

fasehab shaheen is is a data maestro!


```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```



```{r}
ggplot(mpg, aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Engine Size vs Highway Fuel Economy",
    subtitle = "Fuel efficiency decreases as engine displacement increases",
    x = "Engine Displacement (Liters)",
    y = "Highway Miles per Gallon",
    color = "Vehicle Class"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```
